Income Breakdown

2025-2026 Tax Information

Tax Brackets
  • $0 - $18,200: Tax-free threshold
  • $18,201 - $45,000: 19%
  • $45,001 - $120,000: 32.5%
  • $120,001 - $180,000: 37%
  • $180,000+: 45%
Additional Information
Medicare Levy: 2% of taxable income
LITO: Up to $700 for lower income earners
